general_feedback: The four filled-in tags accurately describe the methods' behavior, follow the surrounding Scaladoc style (lowercase start, backticks for code references, concise single-line phrasing), and are consistent with similar @return descriptions elsewhere in the file (e.g., the `map` and `flatMap` siblings). The Either#flatMap and LeftProjection#flatMap @return texts are identical, which is appropriate since they have the same semantics. The withRight/withLeft @return descriptions correctly characterize these as upcasts that return the same instance retyped.
